misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his dedication to the sport and his advocacy for the AimPoint method, a technique he believes is crucial for mastering the greens. Representing Keimola Golf, Timo's presence is always felt, both on and off the course.

With eight past appearances, Timo has become a mainstay in the tournament, demonstrating a consistent commitment to the competition. His three victories in the Hector Trophée is a testament to his skill and strategic approach to pair play.

While the Victor Trophy has eluded him, Timo remains focused on improving his individual game, always seeking new ways to refine his technique and enhance his performance. He is expected to make his ninth appearance in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.
